describes: Common HR policy patterns and terms

entries.ptopolicy: Paid Time Off — accrual-based or annual-grant time-off policy.
entries.fmla: Family and Medical Leave Act — US federal job-protected unpaid leave for qualifying medical/family reasons.
entries.noncompete: Non-compete clause — agreement restricting post-employment competition; enforceability varies by jurisdiction.
entries.atwill: At-will employment — either party may terminate at any time without cause, subject to law.
entries.exit_interview: Exit interview — final discussion with departing employee; commonly captures feedback.
entries.performance_review: Performance review — periodic structured feedback session.
entries.probationary_period: Probationary period — initial employment phase with typically reduced protection.
entries.severance: Severance — payment upon termination, often tied to length of service.
